artifacts.reason: No raw log was retained, and the claimed exact-head full suite is invalid because its test imports a module first added by PR 44.
The reported Linux and RTX preflight evidence was not retained with an exact PR 43 source binding.
The reported security review was not retained as an artifact.

claims.statement: The repository adds path-free launch identity, runtime preflight, OCI process leases, and immutable native publication primitives.
The reported 1021-pass exact-head suite is invalid: test_engine_launch imports optima.eval.oci_prebuild, which is absent at c87ff4ba and first added by PR 44.
A hardened RTX preflight was reported, but no retained artifact binds it to the exact PR 43 implementation tree.

exit_criteria.statement: The host primitive modules avoid inference-runtime and candidate imports by construction.
The clean-detached exact-head suite criterion was not met for this merge unit.

reviews.summary: Implementation review was reported; no report bytes were retained.
Independent bounded security review was reported; no report bytes were retained.
No independently retained confirmation phase was identified for the exact PR 43 head.
